questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Carla: How are things going, Jasper? Jasper: Well, to be honest, Carla, I was feeling great last Saturday, but I started to feel sick on Sunday afternoon. And I am really worried now because I have to give a presentation tomorrow. So, I have to get better by then. Carla: Poor you! Jasper: Well, I thought I had the flu, but luckily the doctor said it was just a bad cold.
options: I can help you with your presentation tomorrow.
Doctors are not available on Sunday afternoon.
You are not an honest person anymore.
What seems to be the problem?
